Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1D3A "AVIATORARCADE-1D3A" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Aviator Arcade (Hindsbosoft - 2014).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Even though this was released as a 16kb cartridge, it takes way too long to boot, so we have now converted it to a quicker booting version.
